variables.name: aws_region
variables.description: AWS region to deploy into (e.g. us-east-1).

variables.name: ami_id
variables.description: AMI ID for the EC2 instance. Must match the target region.

variables.name: key_name
variables.description: Name of the EC2 key pair for SSH access. Leave empty for auto-generated key.

variables.name: auto_key_pair
variables.description: Auto-generate SSH key pair (used by Auto Deploy mode).

variables.name: ssh_user
variables.description: SSH username for the instance (depends on OS).

variables.name: instance_name
variables.description: Name tag applied to the EC2 instance.

variables.name: allowed_ssh_cidr
variables.description: CIDR block allowed SSH access (port 22). Use your IP for security.

variables.name: root_volume_size_gb
variables.description: Root EBS volume size in gigabytes.

variables.name: environment
variables.description: Deployment environment tag (e.g. dev, staging, prod).
